title: Object Container Presentation Space Size (0x9C)
description: Presentation space size triplet layout. (Do not include triplet length or TID here.)

elements.name: PDFSize
elements.description: Parameter used to determine the PDF presentation space size

elements.name: XocBase
elements.description: Presentation space size unit base for the width (X axis)

elements.name: YocBase
elements.description: Presentation space size unit base for the height (Y axis)

elements.name: XocUnits
elements.description: Presentation space size units per unit base for the width (1-32767)

elements.name: YocUnits
elements.description: Presentation space size units per unit base for the height (1-32767)

elements.name: XpsSize
elements.description: Presentation space width (extent along X axis) (1-32,767)

elements.name: YpsSize
elements.description: Presentation space height (extent along Y axis) (1-32,767)
